requirements_addressed: AC-003: stdout is JSON only via output_json()
AC-006: Exit code 0 on success, 1 on error

completion_promises.evidence: Created src/cli.py with all five functions: make_parser() builds the argparse parser, output_json() writes JSON to stdout, exit_code_from_result() returns 0/1 based on error key, run_command() is the async dispatcher, and main() is the CLI entry point. TestFunctionsExist class verifies all are callable.
All 6 subcommands registered via argparse subparsers in make_parser(). Verified by TestSubcommands parametrized test that parses each command successfully.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All stdout output is valid JSON via `output_json()` only
completion_promises.evidence: output_json() is the single function that writes to stdout using json.dumps(). All command paths return dicts that flow through main() -> output_json(). Tests verify stdout is valid JSON for ping, list-focus-areas, extract-insights, and error cases.

Uses logging.getLogger(__name__) which inherits from the root logger configured in __main__.py with stream=sys.stderr. No print() calls outside output_json(). TestLoggingToStderr verifies stdout is pure JSON.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `--help` works on all subcommands with clear argument descriptions
completion_promises.evidence: TestHelp parametrized test verifies --help exits with code 0 for main parser and all 6 subcommands. All arguments have help= descriptions.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Exit code 0 on success, 1 on error (based on `"error"` key in result dict)
completion_promises.evidence: exit_code_from_result() checks for 'error' key and returns 1 if present, 0 otherwise. main() returns this value. TestExitCodes verifies both success (0) and error (1) paths.

run_command() checks if args.transcript == '-' and reads from sys.stdin.read(). TestStdinPipeSupport.test_extract_insights_reads_stdin monkeypatches stdin with StringIO and verifies the transcript text is consumed.

get-transcript subparser has --language (default 'en') and --no-segments (store_true) arguments. TestGetTranscriptFlags verifies defaults and custom values. Mocked dispatch tests verify --no-segments omits segments from output.

extract-insights subparser has --focus (dest=focus_areas, default 'general'), --video-id (default ''), --max-insights (type=int, default 10). TestExtractInsightsFlags verifies all defaults and custom values including comma-separated focus areas.

run_command() is defined as async def, and main() calls asyncio.run(run_command(args)). TestAsyncDispatch verifies run_command is a coroutine function and main() successfully dispatches via asyncio.run().
